atomic_facts.fact: A metal measuring cup pours white powder into the bowl.
A metal spoon drops a yellow solid into the bowl.
The bowl contains dark brown chocolate chips.

spatial: The white bowl is in the center of the frame. The metal measuring cup is above the bowl. The metal spoon is to the right of the bowl. The striped cloth is behind the bowl.

visible_entities.desc: hand with light skin, wearing a gold ring with stones on the index finger, and having light pink nail polish
white ceramic bowl with a textured exterior surface
pile of small, dark brown chocolate chips
white cloth with a grid pattern of thin dark lines

atomic_facts.fact: A hand is pressing a pat of butter down into a bowl of chocolate chips.
A silver spoon is resting on the right side of the bowl.
The bowl is sitting on a white surface next to a patterned cloth.

spatial: The white bowl is in the center of the frame. Inside the bowl, the pile of chocolate chips is below the pat of butter. The hand is positioned above the bowl, with a finger pressing down on the butter. The silver spoon is to the right of the bowl. The patterned cloth is in the background, to the left of the bowl.
